rename.title: Rename
rename.extension_warning: The extension changes from {{from}} to {{to}}. The file may not open properly.

validation.dots_only: Names cannot consist of only dots.

new_project.title: New project
new_project.description: Create a new workspace. You'll be moved into it after creation.
new_project.description_placeholder: What kind of work happens in this project?

validation.too_long: Project name must be 100 characters or less.

errors.session_expired: Your session expired. Please log in again.
errors.name_taken: A project with that name already exists.

new_folder.title: New folder
new_folder.description: Create a new folder in the current location.

validation.dots_only: Folder names cannot consist of only dots.
validation.starts_with_dot: Names starting with . are treated as hidden and won't appear.

invite.title: Invite member
invite.description: Enter the username of the person to invite. Only registered users can be added.

errors.not_found: No user found with that username.
errors.already_member: This user is already a member of this project.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to invite members (project owner only).

copy_to_shared.title: Copy to shared folder
copy_to_shared.body_multi: Copy {{count}} files to the shared folder.

folder_picker.body_single: Choose a folder to move {{name}} into.
folder_picker.body_multi: Choose a folder to move {{count}} items into.
